case_title: LYTLE, MICHAEL J. VS MAIA, CHRISTY L.

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MAIA, CHRISTY L. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LYTLE, MICHAEL J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
